$comment: VENDORED COPY for the WS-A contract test in claude-copilot/tools/cc. Source of truth is copilot-control-tower/docs/01-architecture/schemas/update.schema.json — update this copy from there, not the reverse.
title: copilot update --json
description: Result of a reconciling ecosystem sync. `pruned` ops surface reconciling-sync deletions; `severity_trailer` + `shadowed_by` drive the un-dismissable security banner.

host.description: Host identifier the update was run for, e.g. 'claude-code'. Present in the upstream design's example (design-control-tower-integration.md §1.2) but not marked required since cli-contract.md's prose table omits it.

path.description: ADDITIVE (Component Sync Stream-E, 02-component-sync initiative): the target project's absolute path, present only on a `cc materialize --project <path>`-style per-project result (module: claude-copilot/tools/cc/src/cc/commands/projects.py `build_materialize_project_report()`). Absent on the machine-wide `cc update --json` result this schema also describes -- optional, never required, so this remains a purely additive, backward-compatible widening of the same envelope shape.
path.$comment: ADDED (Stream-E, 02-component-sync): reuses this schema's shape verbatim for the per-project materialize result rather than defining a parallel schema, per the initiative's 'result shape reuses update.schema.json's shape + a path field' build note.

result.$comment: CORRECTED 2026-07-07: the upstream design's `update --json` example (design-control-tower-integration.md §1.2) carries an explicit enum comment: `// applied | up-to-date | held | blocked | offline`. The prior draft left this as an unconstrained non-empty string; tightened to match.

changed.description: Per-item changes applied by the sync.

product.description: Native host product receiving the item.

signed.description: Signature state of the introduced content. Security-relevant: a missing value is treated as unsigned (fail-closed); the CLI must always emit it.

severity_trailer.description: Security-trailer text driving the un-dismissable banner; null when none.
severity_trailer.$comment: Prose names the field without a type; encoded as nullable string.

shadowed_by.description: Identifier of the layer/item shadowing this one; null when not shadowed.
shadowed_by.$comment: Prose names the field without a type; encoded as nullable string.

held_for_approval.description: Changes withheld pending approval (e.g. a held-major awaiting IT/user approval).

reason.description: Why the change is held, e.g. 'major; ecosystem.yml policy=hold-majors'.

held_for_approval.$comment: CORRECTED 2026-07-07: tightened to the shape shown in the upstream design's example (05-control-tower.md §6 / design-control-tower-integration.md §1.2): `{dimension, from, to, reason}`. The prior draft left this fully open; additionalProperties stays true since the example does not claim this is exhaustive.

blocked.description: Changes blocked from applying, e.g. capability-policy denials or signature failures.
blocked.$comment: cli-contract.md/design docs name `blocked:[...]` (capability-policy denials, sig failures) but the upstream design does not show a concrete example item shape for this array (only an empty `blocked: []` in the §1.2 example); left as an open array of objects until the CLI freezes it.
